toolPurpose: Send a single email with optional template, personalization, and attachments. Requires Steward confirmation before sending.

to_email.description: Recipient email address (must be valid email format)

from_email.description: Sender email address (must be a verified SendGrid sender identity)

from_name.description: Sender display name (optional, defaults to SendGrid account name)

subject.description: Email subject line (required if template_id not provided)

plain_text.description: Plain text email body (fallback if HTML not provided)

html_content.description: HTML formatted email body (optional if using template)

template_id.description: SendGrid template ID for consistent branding (e.g., 'd-abc123def456')

dynamic_data.description: Key-value pairs for template variable substitution (e.g., {first_name: 'John', confirm_link: 'https://...'})

categories.description: Email categories for tracking and analytics (e.g., ['marketing', 'newsletter'])

toolPurpose: Retrieve email statistics (delivered, bounced, opened, clicked, etc.) for a specified date range, optionally filtered by category or campaign name.

start_date.description: Start date for statistics in YYYY-MM-DD format

end_date.description: End date for statistics in YYYY-MM-DD format (defaults to today)

categories.description: Filter stats by specific email categories (e.g., ['marketing', 'transactional'])

toolPurpose: Retrieve a paginated list of marketing contacts with filtering by contact status and list membership.

list_id.description: Filter contacts by marketing list ID

limit.description: Number of contacts to return per page (default: 100, max: 1000)

offset.description: Number of contacts to skip for pagination (default: 0)

toolPurpose: Search contacts by email address or custom field values with optional filtering.

email.description: Search by email address (exact or partial match)

custom_field_value.description: Value to match in custom field

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 50, max: 500)

toolPurpose: List email templates in SendGrid account with optional filtering by template name or type.

template_name.description: Filter templates by name (partial match supported)

limit.description: Number of templates to return (default: 100, max: 1000)

offset.description: Number of templates to skip for pagination (default: 0)
